case_title: BRADLEY URTZ VS. BEST BUY INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMARA E. ST. GERMAIN, HOME SERVICES ASSISTANT DELIVERY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE. MATTER CONTINUED TO MARCH 12, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BRADLEY URTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY, REPRESENTED BY TAMARA ST. GERMAIN HOME SERVICES ASSISTANT DELIVERY MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,758.00 FILED BY URTZ, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF URTZ, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2020 - CONTINUED FOR WITNESS TO MAR-12-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF BRADLEY URTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY, REPRESENTED BY TAMARA ST. GERMAIN HOME SERVICES ASSISTANT DELIVERY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH ALL REQUIRED INFORMATION AS TO THE THIRD PARTY COMPANY WHO PROVIDED INSTALATION SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S WASHING MACHINE, IF NOT PROVIDED JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED AGAINST DEFENDANT BEST BUY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMARA ST. GERMAIN, HOME SERVICE DELIVERY FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URTZ, BRADLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST BUY INC $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2020 - JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK WILLIAM TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED. (506)
